title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Toki, Unknown person #13, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #14, Oden, Unknown person #15 as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: toki-chan, please show it to me...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It is fine, open-san, it's already healed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Thank you for protecting our children!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You have endured so much pain....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oden-san, you must not let a trivial thing blind your judgment! If you fight them... the enemy will retaliate!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: toki-chan, it seems you do not know of my "nFamy"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am fully aware of Orochi's Dirty Methods!! You guys!! Protect my family!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was never good with long-winded or wordy speeches...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The land of Wano has fallen into the hands of scum!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A coward, who solely relies on strong pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: He'll turn wano into a living hell!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Will he take over as "shogun" again?

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Kozuki often has invaded the castle!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of our soldiers have been uninhibited! You must flee, immediately!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Oden- sa...oden! Please, think about this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cut me down, and you'll face Kaido's wrath!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: think about what that means for the land of wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Your death comes before anything else!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 39 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
